subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O Lord my God! I beseech Thee by Thy name whereby Thou hast delivered those who were drowning and guided those who were longing
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک باسمک الذی به نجیت المغرقین و هدیت المشتاقین و به
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transcendence; unknowability of God
